task:
Implement Dijkstra’s shortest path algorithm 
Input: A weighted directed graph (adjacency list / adjacency matrix), source vertex s 
Output: dist[] array and prev[] predecessor array 
Requirements: 
Support unreachable vertices (represented by INF) 
Optionally support multi-source initialization 
Use a priority queue (min-heap) for the implementation

Implement a simple in-memory Key-Value storage service (single-node) 
APIs (assuming HTTP/REST): 
PUT /kv/{key}: set value (JSON) 
GET /kv/{key}: get value 
DELETE /kv/{key}: delete key 
Requirements: 
Use an in-memory Map for storage 
Basic error code design (404/400/500) 
Simple logging output (access logs)

Design a web frontend component: Searchable Dropdown 
Features: 
When text is entered into the input box, a filtered list of options appears below. 
After selecting an option, the dropdown collapses and the selected value is displayed. 
Requirements: 
Keyboard interaction: use the Up and Down arrow keys to navigate options, Enter key to confirm selection. 
Support displaying “No matches” when there are no results. 
Provide a callback for when the selected value changes: 
onChange(value)
